description.p: With Sonami you are able to play tracks at their highest quality, explore new tracks using discovery mixes or the explore tab or just enjoy the songs you already know you love from your collection. Just like you would expect from the real app. Sonami also has some additional features such as

ul.li: Background Playback
Gapless playback
MPRIS integration
Scrobbling to ListenBrainz and Last.fm

description.p: Don't have a TIDAL account? You can still try the app and enjoy song previews of up to 30 seconds to see if it's for you.

ul.li: Fixed a large amount of memory leaks and crashes
Fixed a bug where Sonami would prefer cropping an image over one with the correct aspect ratio
Fixed a bug where Sonami would crash when aborting the sign-in attempt to Last.fm
Fixed a bug where shuffle would not get deactivated properly
Fixed a bug where disabling volume normalization would not properly playback the raw audio received from TIDAL
Added "View Artist" and "View Album" buttons to the track list
Added a "Go to Artist" button to the album page
Added support for most keybinds supported by TIDAL desktop
Detailed playback information is now available by right-clicking on the quality label
It is now possible to add an entire album or playlist to the queue
It is now possible to play all tracks in your collection
Some labels now adapt to the state of the element they are describing
The currently playing album cover can now be opened in a media viewer
The page headers & tracklist are now adaptive, allowing for smaller window sizes
Fixed a bug where the player would stop playback on its own between tracks
Added support for Last.fm scrobbling
Added partial translation for Bulgarian
Implemented more consistent "Sign in" prompts
Changed the main view switcher to reset the history when switching views
Updated french translations
Updated german translations
Removed custom window decoration
Removed subtitle in the sidebar window header
Fixed a bug where the player controls would flicker during track load
Fixed a lot of crashes related to accessing dead gobjects
Fixed a bug where opening an empty playlist would result in an error page
Fixed a segfault when starting Sonami while another instance was already running
Fixed a bug where auto-scrolling lyrics would result in a segfault
Fixed a bug where playing empty albums and playlists resulted in a segfault
Fixed a crash when rapidly switching albums and/or tracks
Fixed an issue that resulted in Sonami freezing when changing the volume via MPRIS
Added support for adding and removing albums, artists, mixes, playlists and tracks from your collection
Added translations for Chinese (Simplified Han script)
Added translations for Estonian
Implemented volume normalization
Improved accessibility by migrating to Adwaita style classes
Updated to Go 1.26 resulting in performance improvements
Fixed an issue where we would not deallocate GObjects properly
Fixed an issue where the track list in the search UI was misaligned
Fixed an issue where repeating a track would not work
Fixed an issue where scrobbling could block playback
Fixed an issue where Sonami would fail to show window decorations when set to the left side
You can now configure whether Sonami should autoplay track radios after your queue ends
Added pagination to collection pages
Added sub-pages to all search result types
You can now configure your preferred maximum audio quality
You can now view your feed in Sonami
Fixed gapless playback not always being gapless
Fixed a bug where starting a track list in shuffle-mode would not shuffle the tracks
Improved compliance with the MPRIS spec, fixing an issue with the KDE media player applet
Improved accessibility by adding tooltips to all icon buttons
Added Secret Service self-test
Added French translations
Added Polish translations (LukaszH77)
Added support for custom ListenBrainz servers (thatonecalculator)
Added support for playing top tracks on the artist page
Added support for navigating backwards using the mouse button
Redesigned the sidebar player
Fixed a bug where shuffling an empty queue would crash the app
Fixed a bug where Sonami would always request the english home and explore pages
Now using the correct icons for skipping instead of seeking
Fixed a bug where large track lists would start overlaying after ~200 tracks
Fixed a rare concurrent map access that would crash the app
Sonami is now translated into German
Sonami now marks the currently playing track in the tracklists

description.p: Welcome to the first beta release of Sonami. In this version, we added, well, everything. Give it a look and let us know what we can improve!

ul.li: Home, Explore and Collection pages
View playlist, mixes, albums and artists
Search functionality
Play tracks, playlists, mixes and albums
Sing along with the lyrics tab
Control Sonami using MPRIS
Scrobble your listening activity with ListenBrainz

screenshot.caption: Sonami displaying the public, unauthenticated home page
Sonami showing the search page, while displaying the lyrics of the current song
